creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
A Happy New Year!

Here is a update patch for x11-servers/XttXF86srv-common.
(1) Xtt does not handle "host.def.local" file.
    This is not good for peoples who want to something to modify.
(2) Fix: xfs uninitialized variable.
    Thanks, Akio Morita.
(3) Fix: Big5 mapping probrem.
    I think this is fatal for BIG5 users.
    This patch is developed by the CLE at Taiwan (Chinese Linux Extension).
    Thanks, Clive Lin.

Fix: Please apply following patch to ${PORTSDIR}/x11-servers/XttXF86srv-common.
Thanks.

BEGIN>---8<CUT HERE>8--


END>---8<CUT HERE>8-----wi6xdLO9BAUyYQuIExbbkxNaBtUypKFCcxpkdx9A9F2yWlG3
